うむ、ここはいい森だな。: Mmm, this is a nice forest.
自然が豊かで、命に満ちている。前線基地の環境把握のためと思い散策して<br>いた:
The forest teemed with life. I walked to get familiar with the Frontline
Base's area when a song drifted from deep among the trees.
声のする方に向かうと、やがて歌声の主が見えてきた。<br>それはやはりラモーナだ:
I headed toward the voice, and soon the singer came into view. It was
Ramona, just as I thought.
いつもながらいい歌声だな。<br>でも……: As always, a beautiful voice. But...
今日はその声に、どこか憂いを感じた。<br>心配になり佇んだまま見守っていると、:
Today, I sensed a hint of melancholy in her voice. Worried, I stood
watching until the song broke off partway through.
急に歌うのを止めたラモーナは、憂鬱そうにため息をついている。<br>いったいどう:
Ramona stopped singing so abruptly and let out a dejected sigh. Just
as I was wondering what was wrong, she noticed me.
あ、司令官さま……<br>いつからいらしたんですか？: Ah, Commander... how long have you been there?
少し前からだ。それよりどうしたんだ？<br>急に歌うのをやめてしまったみたいだが:
For a little while now. But more importantly, what's wrong? You
seemed to stop singing all of a sudden... Is something bothering you?
司令官さまに隠し事はできませんね。<br>実は、歌のことでちょっと……:
I suppose I can't hide anything from you, Commander. Actually, it's
about my singing...
かつてすぐれた吟遊詩人だった先輩の老婆から、あなたの歌には人生経験が<br>足り:
A venerable old woman, once a great bard, told me my songs lack life
experience...
吟遊詩人というものは、深い人生経験があればあるほどいい歌が歌えるように<br>な:
It's said that the more life experience a bard has, the better songs
they can sing.
ですが、私のようなその……男性も知らないおなごでは声に深みがないと……:
But... for a maiden like me who has never... known a man... my voice
lacks depth...
そんなことを言われたのか。手厳しいな。<br>まあ、ラモーナはまだ若いのだから仕:
She said that to you? That's harsh. But still, I suppose it can't be
helped—you're still young.
ラモーナはふと、意を決したようにまっすぐにこちらを見つめてきた。<br>こちらも:
Suddenly, Ramona looked straight at me as if she had made up her
mind. Her gaze was so intense it made me straighten up.
あの、これは勝手なお願いなのですが……<br>私の歌に足りない経験を、与えてくだ:
Um, this is a selfish request, but... would you please give me the
experience my songs lack?
その申し出はさすがに驚いた。経験とは明らかに男性経験のことだろう。<br>だがラ:
That request caught me off guard. 'Experience' clearly meant with a
man, but her earnest eyes left me no choice but to answer seriously.
……分かった。そういうことならこれから部屋に来い。<br>そこでラモーナがより良:
Got it. Then come to my room. We'll have a lesson to make you a
better bard.
